BT1933 §5 Theorem I (p.41) gives sectorial Borel-summability statement: difference equation L_n(y)=0 with prescribed exponential dominants Q_j(x) and proper curve Γ admits actual fundamental set of analytic solutions on region right of Γ with each y_j ~ e^{Q_j(x)}s_j(x)
